attacking_style: Demonstrates versatility with ability to contest uphill sprint finishes rather than pure long-range attacks. Shows climbing competence but lacks explosive power for sustained final climb efforts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns across observations.
terrain_preference: Favors shorter, punchier uphill finishes where versatility matters over sustained steep gradients. Struggles on extended final climbs that require pure climbing power.
vulnerability: Loses contact on prolonged final climbs in stage races, particularly when pace is high and sustained. Stage race GC ambitions appear limited by climbing ceiling.
key_patterns: Performs better on uphill sprint finishes than extended mountain stages (2 observations)
Struggles to maintain position on final climbs when racing for GC (2 observations)
Shows non-specialist climber profile: versatile but lacks pure climbing power (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Lost contention on final climb days after strong uphill finish, suggesting limited climbing endurance for stage racing
